title: corchorus urticifolius
intro: Corchorus urticifolius, commonly known as the nalta jute or tossa jute, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Corchorus urticifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, as well as its ability to act as an antifungal and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Corchorus urticifolius can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine systems such as Ayurveda and Unani.
